introduction: A family drama targeting audiences of all ages who feel love and loss. It is about a Taiwanese family who immigrated to Canada and how they faced love and loss within their relatives. The story begins with Yang Jie and his daughter, Yang Ting, talking about a magical sea that sends a letter to their long-departed wife and mother, Hong Jia Jia. Yang Jie then wakes up on the beach where Yang Ting and he once sent a letter to Hong Jia Jia. He wanders around the beach and goes to his house because it's time for Yang Ting to come home from work. However, instead of finding Yang Ting, he encounters Hong Jia Jia, realizing that he is dead. Hong Jia Jia shows the letter that she received a long time ago from Yang Jie and Yang Ting, explaining to him that the sea indeed has a magical power that connects them. They then see a bottle floating down the sea reaching Yang Jie. It is a letter coming from Yang Ting, who tells her father she misses him and wants to say goodbye to him. Finally, Yang Jie comes to terms with no longer being part of the living.
